---
title: "Research"
---

<!-- Template for when work is published — same style as the entries below: -->
<!-- ## Publications -->
<!-- -   **[Title of the article](https://doi.org/...)**\ -->
<!--     *Journal Name.* 2027.\ -->
<!--     With Coauthor One and Coauthor Two. -->

## Under Review and Working Papers

-   **[Marching Together? Military Conscription and Immigration Attitudes in Europe](https://doi.org/10.21203/rs.3.rs-9242475/v1)**\
    Working paper. 2026.

-   **[Cycling through Elections: The Political Consequences of the Tour de France](https://doi.org/10.31235/osf.io/fj4vh_v1)**\
    Under review at *American Political Science Review.* 2025.\
    With Ala Alrababah, Germain Gauthier, and Adam Polak.

-   **The Supply Side of Take-Up: Administrative Capacity and the Production of Citizenship in Germany**\
    Under review at *American Journal of Political Science.*\
    With Jorah Diethold, Niklas Harder, and Giuseppe Pietrantuono.

## Work in Progress

-   **The Army of Unity? Conscription and the Making of Belonging in Reunified Germany**

-   **The Costs of Belonging: Military Service and Citizenship Uptake in Sweden and the Netherlands**\
    With Giuseppe Pietrantuono.

-   **Anti-Muslim Bias and Naturalization in Switzerland**\
    With Mattia Cecchi.
